episodes.title: AI for Business Leaders
episodes.description: A 4-part explainer video covering the physical-to-intelligence evolution of AI, model fine-tuning, agentic workflows with tools like RAG and MCP, and using AI as the connective tissue to bridge enterprise departments.

episodes.title: Evolution of AI & Agents
episodes.description: Traces the AI evolution timeline from 2022 to 2026, illustrating the engineering shift from basic chat assistants to reasoning models and interoperable multi-agent systems.

episodes.title: Git Branch Naming Best Practices | DEPT®
episodes.description: Stop naming your Git branches randomly! A good branch name tells your team exactly what type of work is being done, which ProofHub task it belongs to, and what is changing.

episodes.title: The Evolution of Algorithms
episodes.description: A look at how cryptography has evolved over time, transitioning from today's mathematical-based encryption to the future frontier of quantum encryption and post-quantum cryptography.
